summary: Admin batch frontend testing for iteration 12 (5 new admin pages + AI Insights widget + cascade-delete dialog + Reminder schedules). All 10 admin test cases (A-J) PASS. No crashes on any new route. All required data-testid selectors are present and functional. Empty states render gracefully when backend returns no data (submissions, email logs, audit log, AI suggestions). Disabled-state gate on cascade-delete confirm button works correctly. Reminder schedules save with success toast.

minor.issue: Returned no submissions during test — empty state rendered correctly. Cannot confirm submission-detail-dialog/reply UI end-to-end without seed data.
Returned no email logs — empty state rendered. Cannot confirm email-detail-dialog/email-body end-to-end without seed data.
Returned 0 audit rows — cannot verify audit-row-{id}/audit-detail-dialog/audit-diff selectors end-to-end without activity history.
Returned no suggestions — insights-suggestions block and dashboard-insight-{0,1,2} rows did not render (expected per spec 'if suggestions returned'). Metrics row rendered fine.

action_items: Optional: seed at least one feedback submission, one contact submission, one email log, one audit row, and 1-3 AI insight suggestions so the conditional UI (detail dialogs, suggestion rows, dashboard top-3 widget items) can be visually verified end-to-end in QA. Current implementation correctly hides those sections when data is empty, so this is not a bug — just a coverage gap.
critical_code_review_comments: All new admin pages handle empty-data states gracefully (no crashes when API returns 0 items / 404 / 4xx).
Cascade-delete confirm button correctly gates on literal 'DELETE' string match — verified disabled→enabled transition.
Sidebar 5 new nav items are correctly wired with stable data-testid attributes derived from label (e.g. sidebar-nav-ai-insights, sidebar-nav-email-logs).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 admin testids verified; conditional blocks correctly hidden on empty data)

seed_data_creation: None — testing performed against live backend state. Only Reminder Schedules PUT was triggered (saved 7,3,1 across all three fields with success toast).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin batch testids confirmed in DOM: admin-submissions-page, submissions-tab-feedback/contact, submissions-status-filter, admin-emails-page, emails-search-input/status-filter/template-filter, admin-email-templates-page, templates-list, template-item-*, template-subject-input, template-body-input, template-active-switch, template-preview-btn (opens template-preview-dialog), template-save-btn, template-test-send-btn (disabled until email filled — verified), reseed-templates-btn, admin-audit-log-page, audit-action-filter, audit-target-filter, audit-refresh-btn, admin-insights-page, insights-metrics, insights-refresh-btn, dashboard-insights-widget, dashboard-insights-view-all (href=/adminpanel/insights), admin-delete-user-btn, admin-delete-user-dialog, admin-delete-confirm-input, admin-delete-user-confirm-btn (gates on 'DELETE'), admin-user-activity-log, settings-reminders-section, reminder-renewal-days, reminder-trial-days, reminder-payment-retry-days, save-reminders-btn (toast 'Reminder schedules saved' confirmed). Submissions/emails/audit/insights detail UIs are conditionally rendered and need seed data to verify visually.
